ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "assigned_id" INTEGER /* Assigned identification number for the case */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated outbreak */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group of the infected individual */,
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighbourhood where the case was reported */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of infection */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification of the case */,
  "client_gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client's gender */,
  "episode_date" TEXT /* Date of the episode onset */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was reported */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., Resolved, Active) */,
  "currently_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the client is currently hospitalized */,
  "currently_icu" INTEGER /* Indicates if the client is currently in ICU */,
  "currently_intubated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the client is currently intubated */,
  "ever_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the client has ever been hospitalized */,
  "ever_icu" INTEGER /* Indicates if the client has ever been in ICU */,
  "ever_intubated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the client has ever been intubated */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Description of symptoms experienced by the client */,
  "exposure_history" TEXT /* Description of exposure history of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources_of_infection ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_client_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_neighbourhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_id") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "fsa" TEXT /* Forward Sortation Area code for the neighbourhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighbourhood */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the neighbourhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "outbreak_type" TEXT /* Type of outbreak (e.g., Sporadic, Epidemic) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date outbreak started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date outbreak ended, if applicable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of outbreak (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outbreak */,
  "reported_cases" INTEGER /* Number of reported cases in the outbreak */,
  "estimated_transmissibility" TEXT /* Estimated transmissibility of the outbreak (e.g., basic reproduction number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources_of_infection" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source of infection */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Travel, Community) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how infection is transmitted through this source */,
  "transmission_risk" TEXT /* Estimated transmission risk associated with this source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification (e.g., Confirmed, Suspected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the classification type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the classification (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the age range (inclusive) */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the age range (inclusive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 20 to 29 Years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender option */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., MALE, FEMALE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated case */,
  "hospitalization_status" TEXT /* Current hospitalization status (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "date_admitted" TEXT /* Date when the individual was admitted to the hospital */,
  "date_discharged" TEXT /* Date when the individual was discharged from the hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in the hospital where the individual was admitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_admissions" (
  "icu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICU admission record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated case */,
  "icu_status" TEXT /* Current ICU status (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "date_admitted" TEXT /* Date when the individual was admitted to ICU */,
  "date_discharged" TEXT /* Date when the individual was discharged from ICU */,
  "icu_bed_type" TEXT /* Type of ICU bed (e.g., invasive ventilation, non-invasive ventilation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_admissions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intubations" (
  "intubation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intubation record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated case */,
  "intubation_status" TEXT /* Current intubation status (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "date_intubated" TEXT /* Date when the individual was intubated */,
  "date_extubated" TEXT /* Date when the individual was extubated */,
  "intubation_type" TEXT /* Type of intubation (e.g., endotracheal, tracheostomy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intubation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intubations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the case was accessed (e.g., IP address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated case */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, antibody) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated case */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number of the vaccine */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccine was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposures" (
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated case */,
  "exposure_date" TEXT /* Date of exposure */,
  "exposure_location" TEXT /* Location of exposure */,
  "exposure_type" TEXT /* Type of exposure (e.g., close contact, community spread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposures_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
